Venue Manager
Changes reflect instantly on the booking page
Import Venues from CSV
Upload a CSV file to bulk-add venues. They'll appear instantly on the booking page.
📄 Expected CSV Format Columns (in order): Day, Date, Show Slot, Event/Campaign, Venue, Venue Confirmation Status, PRIVATE / PUBLIC
Date: 1-Jan-2026 or 01/01/2026  ·  Slot: 6:30 - 7:30 PM or 6:00 to 8:00 PM
Example: Thursday, 1-Jan-2026, 6:30 - 7:30 PM, GCC, Rotticious, Confirmed, Public
📂
Click to upload or drag & drop CSV files only · Max 500 rows
